layers_outer_to_inner.name: periderm (bark)
layers_outer_to_inner.cells: suberized cork cells; LAC17 lignified; waterproof; light-transmitting for chloroplasts beneath

layers_outer_to_inner.name: photosynthetic cortex
layers_outer_to_inner.cells: chloroplast-rich parenchyma; Lhcb1/Lhcb2 high; major photosynthetic zone; venation pattern here

layers_outer_to_inner.name: stomatal epidermis
layers_outer_to_inner.cells: guard cell pairs (FAMA+); stomatal density 100/mm² on adaxial (dorsal) surfaces

layers_outer_to_inner.name: cambium ring
layers_outer_to_inner.cells: WOX4+ stem cells; divides outward→cortex, inward→xylem-analog reinforcement

layers_outer_to_inner.name: xylem-analog
layers_outer_to_inner.cells: CesA4/7/8 secondary wall; water conduction; mechanical support; annual rings

ig_topology: Þ=𐑪 — bark layers wrap the body in concentric cylinders; branching at extremities adds fractal dimension; topologically distinct from bilateral skin
ig_winding: Ω=𐑽 — cellulose microfibrils wound at 15-20° to cell axis; stacked grana above; crystalline winding throughout
